home.title: Crafting fast, thoughtful web experiences
home.description: I'm Marcello — Full-stack engineer crafting reliable, high-performance systems with Java, Spring Boot/Quarkus & Angular — with a growing passion for Rust.

projects.title: Projects
projects.description: Discover selected personal and professional projects built with modern web technologies. Each card links to a detailed case study.

blog.title: Latest posts
blog.description: Notes, tutorials and ideas on building for the web.

about.summary: I'm a full-stack engineer passionate about building thoughtful, fast and accessible digital products. With a background spanning startups and studios, I enjoy the full arc of product work — from sketching interactions to shipping resilient systems. When I'm not coding, you'll find me photographing cityscapes and tinkering with generative art.

experienceItems.title: Senior Full-Stack Engineer · Nebula Labs
experienceItems.content: Lead the architecture of a real-time analytics platform serving 2M+ daily users. Built the design system and mentored a team of five engineers, shipping features from concept to production with Next.js, TypeScript and Go.

experienceItems.title: Frontend Engineer · Orbit Studio
experienceItems.content: Crafted pixel-perfect, accessible interfaces for award-winning client projects. Introduced a component library that cut delivery time by 40% and championed performance budgets across the team.

experienceItems.title: Junior Developer · Brightseed
experienceItems.content: Developed internal tools and marketing sites, learning the craft of clean, maintainable code. Owned the migration of a legacy Rails app to a modern React stack.

educationItems.title: B.Sc. then Master's in Computer Science · ITUniversity Madagascar
educationItems.content: Fullstack computer science track – bachelor's graduated in 2026, master's in progress. Proficient in Java, TypeScript, Spring Boot, Quarkus, and Angular. Experienced in web application development, REST API design, and microservices architecture.

educationItems.title: Master's in Accounting, Control and Audit · INSCAE / IAE Poitiers
educationItems.content: Advanced training in auditing, management control, and financial accounting. Skilled in financial analysis, account consolidation, budget management, and reporting. Delivered by INSCAE / IAE Poitiers.

contact.title: We'd love to Hear From You.

footer.description: Full-stack software engineer building robust, scalable systems with Java (Quarkus, Spring Boot) and TypeScript (Angular). Currently exploring Rust to push further into performance-critical, systems-level programming.

sections.heading: Overview
paragraphs: This Privacy Policy explains how Martzcode (“we”, “us”, or “our”) collects, uses, and discloses information when you visit martzcode.dev (the “Site”). By using the Site, you agree to the practices described in this policy.

sections.heading: Information we collect
paragraphs: We collect only the information necessary to operate and improve the Site:

list.label: Usage data
list.text: such as pages visited, browser type, device information, and approximate location, collected automatically through analytics and advertising technologies.

list.label: Contact information
list.text: you voluntarily provide when you message us through the contact form (e.g., your name and email address).

paragraphsAfter: We do not knowingly collect personal information from children under the age of 13.

sections.heading: Cookies and advertising
paragraphs: The Site uses cookies and similar technologies to function properly, analyze traffic, and serve relevant advertising. We participate in the Google AdSense program, which uses cookies to serve ads based on your prior visits to this and other websites.

Google and its partners may use advertising cookies to personalize the ads you see. You can opt out of personalized advertising by visiting the Google Ads Settings page, and you can manage cookies through your browser settings.

sections.heading: Analytics
paragraphs: We may use privacy-friendly analytics to understand how the Site is used. This data is aggregated and does not identify you personally.

sections.heading: Your rights
paragraphs: Depending on your location, you may have the right to access, correct, or delete the personal information we hold about you, and to object to or restrict certain processing. To exercise these rights, contact us using the details below.

sections.heading: Contact
paragraphs: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, email us at hello@martzcode.dev.

sections.heading: Acceptance of terms
paragraphs: By accessing or using martzcode.dev (the “Site”), you agree to be bound by these Terms & Conditions. If you do not agree, please do not use the Site.

sections.heading: Use of the Site
paragraphs: The content provided on the Site is for general informational purposes. You agree to use the Site lawfully and not to misuse, disrupt, or attempt to gain unauthorized access to any part of it.

sections.heading: Intellectual property
paragraphs: All original text, code, and designs on this Site are the property of Martzcode unless otherwise noted. Third-party trademarks, logos, and product names belong to their respective owners.

sections.heading: Advertising
paragraphs: The Site may display third-party advertisements, including through the Google AdSense program. We are not responsible for the content or practices of external advertisers.

sections.heading: Disclaimer
paragraphs: The Site is provided “as is” without warranties of any kind. We are not liable for any damages arising from your use of the Site.

sections.heading: Changes
paragraphs: We may update these Terms from time to time. Continued use of the Site after changes constitutes acceptance of the revised Terms.
